title: An Act Regarding Exceptions for Persons Learning to Drive Who Have Not Yet Completed a Driver Education Course
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 13, 2025
last_house_action: 4/3/2025 - Committee on Transportation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
